title: JAGGAER Sourcing Event
description: Schema for a JAGGAER ASO sourcing event, representing a structured procurement activity such as an RFQ, RFP, or reverse auction created within the Advanced Sourcing Optimizer platform.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for the sourcing event within the ASO platform.

eventName.description: Name of the sourcing event. Maximum 100 characters.

eventDescription.description: Optional description providing additional context for the sourcing event.
eventDescription.example: Request for quotation for packaging materials needed in Q3 2026.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the sourcing event.

templateId.description: Identifier of the template used to create this event.

customerHostId.description: Identifier of the customer host that owns this event.

createdByUserId.description: Identifier of the user who created this event.

suppliers.description: Suppliers invited to participate in this sourcing event.

items.description: Line items to be sourced in this event.

attributes.description: Custom attributes attached to this sourcing event.

Supplier.description: A supplier participating in a sourcing event.

status.description: Participation status of the supplier in the event.

Item.description: A line item within a sourcing event.

itemId.description: Unique identifier for the line item.

itemName.description: Name of the good or service being sourced.

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure for the quantity (e.g., EA, LB, BOX).

Attribute.description: A custom attribute field on a sourcing event.

attributeType.description: Data type classification of the attribute.

examples.eventDescription: Request for quotation for packaging materials needed in Q3 2026.
